caption_seed: Prior diagonal persona-temperature bundles are contrasted with the SCIS fully crossed persona x temperature design.
Prior work bundled each persona with one temperature, producing diagonal-only coverage.
SCIS independently crosses persona and temperature to estimate main effects and interaction.
H_norm_sigmoid_s_v1 anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5 T3 anger burden=0.654771; score deepseek/deepseek-v3.2 T3 sadness burden=0.039432

Representative high-interaction entropy case. Normalized fuzzy entropy \(H^*\) for Claude Sonnet 4.5 on Text 3, anger. Axes show four personas and four temperatures; cell values are repeat means. This example has B=0.655 and should not be read as the panel average.
Representative low-interaction score case. Mean score for DeepSeek V3.2 on Text 3, sadness. Axes show four personas and four temperatures; cell values are repeat means. This example has B=0.039.
Mean persona-temperature interaction burden by model, averaged over texts and emotions. Score and normalized fuzzy entropy \(H^*\) are summarized under the same crossed cell structure.
